title: Medal of Liberty

The '''Medal of Liberty''' was a medal given to [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] for outstanding bravery and courage.

It was awarded to pilots who participated in the first [[Zaarin insurrection|campaign]] to hunt down the rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], including [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]]. Though the campaign failed to capture or [[Death/Legends|kill]] the [[Treason/Legends|traitor]], it managed to push his forces back and liberate a [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of space from his control, hence the name of the medal. The Imperial Navy also secured the [[Vorknkx Project]].

==Design==
The ribbon had [[Gold/Legends|gold]] and [[Color/Legends|blue]] linings, and was primarily blue with some red linings as well as a more simplistic depiction of the [[Imperial crest/Legends|Imperial crest]] at the center. The medal itself had gold linings, and was silver and red in the middle. The medal's shape was similar to an arrowhead, only it also had two spikes on each side.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
